subcategory: 3D interactive draggable card with physics-based spring animations
use_cases: Interactive product showcases with 3D perspective effects
Premium portfolio cards with physics-based drag interactions
E-commerce product cards with realistic motion feedback
Creative UI elements requiring user engagement
ai_summary: A 3D draggable card component featuring physics-based spring animations, mouse-tracking perspective transforms, and glare effects. The card responds to user interaction with smooth 3D rotations and constrained dragging, making it ideal for premium product showcases and interactive portfolios.
